Description:
This dataset contains annual trade information for India, broken down by specific commodities identified using their unique HS codes. For each financial year (starting from 2017–18), the table includes:
Export values
Import values
Trade difference, calculated as exports minus imports
Additionally, the dataset provides year-over-year comparisons of these metrics, allowing analysis of how exports, imports, and trade balances have changed over time for each commodity.

This dataset contains annual trade information for India, categorized by partner countries. For each financial year (starting from 2017–18), it includes:
Export values to each country
Import values from each country
Trade difference, calculated as exports minus imports
Each country is uniquely identified, and the dataset also provides year-over-year comparisons of these metrics, enabling analysis of how India’s trade relationships with different countries have evolved over time.
